description: A weekend security log has been left on the desktop (/home/ga/Desktop/weekend_security_log.txt). Process the reported incidents by entering them into OpenMaint (login: admin/admin) as corrective maintenance tickets. Identify and exclude any incidents that are already present in the system to avoid creating duplicate tickets. For each unique new incident, create a ticket using the code sequence starting with SEC-MON-001 and assign it to the correct building. Set ticket priorities based on the log description: Water and Safety issues must be set to Critical/High, while all other incidents should be set to Medium/Low.
